query:
-- Add new event types to usage_events
ALTER TABLE usage_events MODIFY COLUMN event_type ENUM(
  'CLAIM_PROCESSED',
  'AI_EVALUATED',
  'FAST_TRACK_TRIGGERED',
  'AUTO_APPROVED',
  'ASSESSOR_TOOL_USED',
  'FLEET_VEHICLE_ACTIVE',
  'AGENCY_POLICY_BOUND',
  'AI_ASSESSMENT_TRIGGERED',
  'DOCUMENT_INGESTED',
  'EXECUTIVE_ANALYTICS_QUERY',
  'GOVERNANCE_CHECK',
  'FLEET_VEHICLE_MANAGED',
  'MARKETPLACE_QUOTE_REQUEST'
) NOT NULL;

-- Add monetisation tracking fields
ALTER TABLE usage_events
ADD COLUMN user_id INT NULL COMMENT 'User who triggered the event',
ADD COLUMN resource_type VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'Type of resource (claim, document, vehicle, etc.)',
ADD COLUMN compute_units DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 1.0000 COMMENT 'Normalized compute cost',
ADD COLUMN processing_time_ms INT NULL COMMENT 'Processing duration in milliseconds',
ADD COLUMN estimated_cost DECIMAL(10, 4) NULL COMMENT 'Estimated cost in cents';
